Global (All).title: US-China trade tensions escalate amid Taiwan tensions
Global (All).summary: US-China tensions over Taiwan have led to a worsening of trade relations, with both countries imposing new tariffs.

Global (All).title: UN warns of unprecedented food shortages due to war in Ukraine
Global (All).summary: The UN has warned that food shortages due to the ongoing conflict in Ukraine are reaching catastrophic levels

Global (All).title: Brazil's Bolsonaro faces growing pressure from Congress
Global (All).summary: Brazil's President Bolsonaro is facing increasing pressure from Congress, which is pushing to remove him from office

United States.title: Ukraine war: U.S. to send more tanks to Ukraine
United States.summary: The U.S. says it will send 31 M1 Abrams tanks to Ukraine, as part of a broader package of military aid. The move is seen as a significant escalation in the West's support for Ukraine in its conflict with Russia.

United States.title: U.S. Capitol Police officer shot in Washington D.C.
United States.summary: A U.S. Capitol Police officer was shot and injured in Washington D.C. during a domestic terrorism incident. The officer's condition is reported to be stable.

United States.title: U.S. House passes bill to avert national rail strike
United States.summary: The U.S. House of Representatives passed a bill to avert a national rail strike by imposing a tentative agreement on rail workers. The measure now goes to the Senate for consideration.

South Korea.title: N. Korea fires ballistic missile into Japan's EEZ, sparks global condemnation
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired a ballistic missile into Japan's exclusive economic zone (EEZ) on January 24, 2023, prompting strong condemnation from the global community.

South Korea.title: Seoul's spy agency warns of potential N. Korea cyberattacks
South Korea.summary: South Korea's National Intelligence Service (NIS) has issued a warning about potential cyberattacks from North Korea, citing a surge in suspicious online activities.

South Korea.title: Protest against Yoon government escalates in Seoul
South Korea.summary: Hundreds of protesters gathered in front of the Presidential Palace in Seoul to express their opposition to President Yoon Suk-yeol's policies, leading to minor clashes with police.

Japan.title: Japan's Defence Ministry confirms 4 Chinese warships spotted in East China Sea
Japan.summary: Japanese Defence Ministry confirms the presence of 4 Chinese warships in the East China Sea, raising tensions in the region.

Japan.title: Tokyo's Shinjuku district hit with suspected 'Ammunition explosion'; casualties reported
Japan.summary: An explosion in Tokyo's Shinjuku district is believed to be related to ammunition, resulting in reported casualties.

Japan.title: Japan considers revising pacifist constitution to allow greater military involvement amid China threat
Japan.summary: Japan is considering revisions to its pacifist constitution to allow for increased military involvement, driven by growing concern over China's regional ambitions.
